title: Cyv
description: Port of CyvClient-1.8.9 parkour features to forge and fabric.
body:
This is a fabric mod port of CyvClient 1.8.9's parkour features, and an alternative to MPKMod2. A forge mod version also exists for version 1.8.9 and version 1.12.2 (not maintained). 

CyvFabric is a client-sided mod to enhance technical/theorycraft parkour. It does not modify game mechanics in any way, and can be used on servers. This mod provides on-screen labels for coordinates and various angles of the player at high decimal precision, as well as a personal best offset tracking system for repeated attempts on the same jump.

This mod also includes tick-based keystrokes for better clip analysis and sharing, as well as togglesprint and directionHUD as quality of life features.

Most mod features can be accessed from the base command `/mpk`.
